title: hieracium chenevardianum
intro: Hieracium chenevardianum, also known as Chenevard's hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and treat gastrointestinal issues such as constipation and indigestion. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, including vitamins A and C, potassium, and iron, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects that can help soothe skin irritations and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. In herbal preparations, Hieracium chenevardianum is often used as a tea or tincture to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
